description: Visual refinement of RightHeadPanel.tsx, LeftConsole.tsx, BottomTimeline.tsx, and src/index.css to achieve premium OEM-quality dashboard appearance with better spacing, glow effects, section headers, denser wireframes, and improved chart presentation.
steps: Update src/components/cockpit/RightHeadPanel.tsx: Make the 3D head model SVG larger (use full available space). Add significantly denser wireframe lines (latitude/longitude grid with at least 8 horizontal and 6 vertical curves across the head shape). Add both eye glow points as larger pulsing circles (left and right eye). Show a unified gaze cone from the midpoint between both eyes (not from a single point) - make the cone wider and more visible with gradient opacity. Add a clearer 0-axis reference with labeled crosshairs. Keep CSS transform rotation based on headPose yaw/pitch/roll with the existing +-45 degree visual clamp. Make the panel background have a subtle radial gradient. Add a premium border glow when gaze is on-road.

Update src/components/cockpit/LeftConsole.tsx: Add section headers 'DRIVER', 'STATE', 'BEHAVIOR', 'ENGINEERING' as styled dividers (thin line with centered text, subtle glow). Make the state badge larger and more prominent with a pulsing border animation when not NORMAL. Improve spacing between sections. Make behavior icons feel more automotive: increase icon container size to w-8 h-8, add rounded-lg shape, add subtle inner shadow. Progress bars should have a subtle glow effect (box-shadow on the fill). Improve font hierarchy - section headers in 11px bold uppercase with letter-spacing.

Update src/components/cockpit/BottomTimeline.tsx: Add small value readouts above each sparkline chart showing the current numeric value (e.g., '42%' for PERCLOS). Improve chart labels with slightly larger font and better contrast. Make the alert markers in the timeline bar wider (w-1.5) with rounded shape and glow. Add subtle gradient backgrounds to each sparkline cell. Keep the bottom strip compact (180px height is set by Dashboard.tsx).

Update src/index.css: Add a new @keyframes for subtle-glow (softer version for progress bars). Add a @keyframes for panel-border-glow (for the center video panel outer glow). Add a glass-morphism utility class (.glass-panel) with backdrop-blur and semi-transparent background. Add a .section-header class for the styled dividers in LeftConsole. Add a scanline-overlay class that can be applied for the camera feed effect. Ensure all existing animations (glow, pulse-border, scanline) are preserved.
acceptance_criteria: RightHeadPanel has at least 8 additional wireframe curves compared to current state
RightHeadPanel shows two distinct eye glow points
RightHeadPanel gaze cone originates from midpoint between eyes
LeftConsole has 4 section headers: DRIVER, STATE, BEHAVIOR, ENGINEERING
LeftConsole state badge has larger text and pulsing animation for non-NORMAL states
LeftConsole progress bars have glow effect via box-shadow
BottomTimeline shows current numeric values above each chart
BottomTimeline alert markers have glow and are more visible
src/index.css contains new animation keyframes without breaking existing ones
All components still accept DMSTelemetry data prop correctly
verification: Read RightHeadPanel.tsx and count wireframe path elements (should be significantly more than current ~6)
Read LeftConsole.tsx and verify 4 section header strings are present
Read BottomTimeline.tsx and verify numeric value readouts exist above charts
Read src/index.css and verify new keyframe definitions are added alongside existing ones
Verify no imports reference packages outside the existing dependency list
